# project-cli

Project management CLI demonstrating docs markers

<!-- politty:root-header:end -->

## Global Options

These options are shared across `build` and `deploy` commands.

<!-- politty:global-options:start -->

<a id="global-options"></a>
| Option | Alias | Description | Required | Default |
|--------|-------|-------------|----------|---------|
| `--verbose` | `-v` | Enable verbose output | No | `false` |

<!-- politty:global-options:end -->

## Command Reference

<!-- politty:index:start -->

### [init](./README.md)

Initialize a new project

| Command                  | Description              |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------ |
| [init](./README.md#init) | Initialize a new project |
